import io
import string

fn parse_two(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut nums = [0, 0]
  mut idx = 0
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n and idx < 2
    let b = string.byte_at(s, i)
    match b
    when Some(c)
      if c >= 48 and c <= 57
        mut val = 0
        mut j = i
        while j < n
          let bb = string.byte_at(s, j)
          match bb
          when Some(cc)
            if cc >= 48 and cc <= 57
              val = val * 10 + (cc - 48)
              j = j + 1
            else
              j = n + 1
            end
          when None
            j = n + 1
          end
        end
        if idx == 0
          nums = [val, 0]
        else
          nums = [nums.get(0).ok_or(0).into(), val]
        end
        idx = idx + 1
        i = j
      else
        i = i + 1
      end
    when None
      i = i + 1
    end
  end
  nums
end

fn gcd(_ a: Int, _ b: Int) -> Int
  mut x = a
  mut y = b
  while y != 0
    let t = y
    y = x % y
    x = t
  end
  x
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  mut a = 0
  mut b = 0
  mut idx = 0
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(input)
  while i < n and idx < 2
    let bo = string.byte_at(input, i)
    match bo
    when Some(c)
      if c >= 48 and c <= 57
        mut val = 0
        mut j = i
        mut done = false
        while j < n and not done
          let bb = string.byte_at(input, j)
          match bb
          when Some(cc)
            if cc >= 48 and cc <= 57
              val = val * 10 + (cc - 48)
              j = j + 1
            else
              done = true
            end
          when None
            done = true
          end
        end
        if idx == 0
          a = val
        else
          b = val
        end
        idx = idx + 1
        i = j
      else
        i = i + 1
      end
    when None
      i = i + 1
    end
  end
  let g = gcd(a, b)
  println("gcd=#{g}")
end
